prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a statistical model (Geometric Brownian Motion) using the current price ($510.43), an estimated historical daily volatility for TMO (1.4%), and an assumed small positive daily drift (approximating an 8% annualized return). The point estimate reflects this drift over 20 trading days. The confidence intervals are calculated using the log-normal distribution, which accounts for the inability of stock prices to fall below zero. These are statistical probabilities and do not guarantee future performance; actual prices can vary significantly due to unpredictable market factors.
